Genome seed: 2745417368, 1860954006, 4186933004, 3384820058, 469064411, 3130620958, 1428676830, 3185927355, 4248056343, 1984108193, 3884765613, 3564713923, 20213089, 598719364, 3663425019, 2173355016
Image index: 6

HSV Channel Expressions:
H(x,y) = tan(abs(y) + cos(tan((0.32683146) * sqrt(sqrt(sqrt(x - y))))))
S(x,y) = x
V(x,y) = y
